species: Mice lacking the Asb1 gene exhibit severe fertility impairment...
tissue: ASB1, the substrate recognition subunit of a ubiquitin ligase, is highly expressed in the mouse testis.

disease_state: Mice lacking the Asb1 gene exhibit severe fertility impairment, characterized by oligoasthenoteratozoospermia.
sample_source: ASB1 interacts with SQOR and promotes its polyubiquitination in mouse testes.
age: adult male mice (8 weeks–4 months old) were individually housed...
